FORGOT_PASSWORD_SUBTITLE: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
FORGOT_SUCCESS_BODY: We sent a password reset link to
RESET_PASSWORD_SUBTITLE: Choose a new password for your account.
RESET_PASSWORD_SUCCESS_BODY: Your password has been changed successfully.
RESET_PASSWORD_INVALID_BODY: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
RESET_PASSWORD_ERROR_TOO_SHORT: Password must be at least 6 characters
VERIFY_EMAIL_BODY_SENT: We sent a verification link to
VERIFY_EMAIL_BODY_INSTRUCTIONS: Click the link in the email to activate your account, then come back to log in.
VERIFY_EMAIL_HINT: Can't find it? Check your spam folder.
JOIN_QUINIELA_SUBTITLE: Enter the 6-digit code from your group organizer to access the tournament.
BANNER_UNSENT_TEXT: You haven't submitted your predictions yet!
BANNER_UPDATABLE_TEXT: Predictions are still open — you can update yours!
PRED_FORM_SUBTITLE_OPEN: Fill in your predicted score for every match and pick the tournament top scorer. You can save your progress at any time and update picks while predictions are open.
PRED_FORM_SUBTITLE_LOCKED: Fill in your predicted score for every match and pick the tournament top scorer. Predictions are locked and can no longer be changed.
PRED_FORM_ERROR_INCOMPLETE: Please fill in all match predictions and select a top scorer before submitting.
PROFILE_READONLY_TOP_SCORER_NOTE: +15 bonus points if correct at end of tournament
RANKINGS_EMPTY: No players yet — be the first to join!
GROUP_TABLE_PROJECTED_NOTE: * Includes this player's own prediction for matches not yet played.
MATCH_DETAIL_EMPTY: Predictions will be revealed once the match begins.
MATCH_DETAIL_WHATIF_SUBTITLE: Projected leaderboard if this match's points were applied with the current score.
MATCH_DETAIL_RESULT_SUBTITLE: How the standings look with this match's points applied.
RULES_INTRO: Scoring ranges from 0 to 5 points, based on the final match result. In the knockout stage, extra time and penalty shootouts are included when applicable.
RULES_GROUP_5_EXAMPLE_WIN: You picked 🇲🇽 2–1 🇿🇦 and the real result was 🇲🇽 2–1 🇿🇦.
RULES_GROUP_5_EXAMPLE_DRAW: Draw: You picked 🇲🇽 1–1 🇿🇦 and the real result was 🇲🇽 1–1 🇿🇦.
RULES_GROUP_3_BODY: You got the winner (or the draw) right, but not the exact goals.
RULES_GROUP_3_EXAMPLE_WIN: You picked 🇲🇽 1–0 🇿🇦, but the real result was 🇲🇽 2–1 🇿🇦.
RULES_GROUP_3_EXAMPLE_DRAW: Draw: You picked 🇲🇽 0–0 🇿🇦, but the real result was 🇲🇽 1–1 🇿🇦.
RULES_KNOCKOUT_INTRO: The score includes extra time. Since it gets tougher, the point values shift:
RULES_KNOCKOUT_5_BODY_WINNER: There's a winner and you got the exact score (e.g. 🇧🇷 2–1 🇪🇸).
RULES_KNOCKOUT_5_BODY_PENALTIES: It goes to penalties: you got the exact draw score AND the team that advances (e.g. you picked 2–2, 🇧🇷 advances — and that's exactly what happened).
RULES_KNOCKOUT_4_BODY: It goes to penalties, you got the exact draw score (e.g. 2–2), but picked the wrong team to advance (e.g. you had 🇪🇸 going through but 🇧🇷 won the shootout).
RULES_KNOCKOUT_3_TITLE: 3 Points — Correct Winner or Non-Exact Draw
RULES_KNOCKOUT_3_BODY_WINNER: You predicted 🇧🇷 to win but got the score wrong (e.g. you picked 2–0 but the real result was 🇧🇷 2–1 🇪🇸).
RULES_KNOCKOUT_3_BODY_DRAW: You predicted a draw but got the goals wrong (e.g. you picked 1–1 but the real result was 🇧🇷 2–2 🇪🇸). The penalty winner doesn't matter here — it's a flat 3 points. Rewarding the qualifier on top would be a double prize, since you'll already earn points for that team advancing in the next round.
RULES_MATCHUP_SUBTITLE: Only if you scored 0 on the match result
RULES_MATCHUP_INTRO: If you missed the match result but correctly predicted who would face each other in this tie, you earn points for your bracket knowledge:
RULES_MATCHUP_2_BODY: Both teams you predicted are exactly right (e.g. you had 🇧🇷 vs 🇪🇸 and that's the exact matchup).
RULES_MATCHUP_1_BODY: You got one of the two teams right (e.g. you had 🇧🇷 vs 🇪🇸, but the real match ended up being 🇧🇷 vs 🇰🇷).
RULES_MATCHUP_NOTE: These matchup points do not stack with match result points. They only apply when you scored 0 on the match.
